creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to gelonnov from comment #0)

Is this report related to net/ntpsec or to ntpd(7) ?

On my system 'service ntpd start' starts /usr/sbin/ntpd, not /usr/local/sbin/ntpd, and ntpd_flags is related to /usr/sbin/ntpd.

Do you have /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ntpd ?

Yuri
